metadata.title: Edge TTS
metadata.description: Read notes aloud using Microsoft Edge Read Aloud API (free, high quality text-to-speech).

name:"Add current note to playback queue"
regex.target: name:"将当前笔记添加到播放队列"

regex.source: name:"Add selected text to playback queue"
regex.target: name:"将所选文本添加到播放队列"

regex.source: text:"Create audio narration for your Obsidian notes using our free mobile app."
regex.target: text:"使用我们的免费移动应用程序为您的Obsidian笔记创建音频旁白。"

regex.source: text:"Please star this project on GitHub if you find it useful \u2B50\uFE0F"
regex.target: text:"如果你觉得这个项目有用，请在GitHub上 Star\u2B50\uFE0F"

regex.source: text:"Configure what content is filtered from notes before speech generation. Click to expand options."
regex.target: text:"配置在语音生成之前从笔记中过滤哪些内容。单击以展开选项。"

regex.source: text:"Configure how comparison symbols are replaced with words in different languages. Click to expand options."
regex.target: text:"配置如何用不同语言的单词替换比较符号。单击以展开选项。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Change playback speed multiplier (ex. 0.5 = 0.5x playback speed (50% speed)). Default = 1.0")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改播放速度倍数（例如0.5=0.5x播放速度（50%速度））。默认值=1.0")

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle notices for processing status and errors.")
regex.target: .setDesc("切换处理状态和错误的通知。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle playback button in the status bar.")
.setDesc("Toggle menu items in the file and editor menus.")
regex.target: .setDesc("切换文件和编辑器菜单中的菜单项。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Hide the floating playback control popover during audio playback.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在音频播放期间隐藏浮动播放控件弹出窗口。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Keep playback controls open after audio finishes to allow replaying.")
regex.target: .setDesc("音频播放结束后，保持播放控制打开，以允许播放。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable the playback queue functionality including queue manager and queue-related commands.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用播放队列功能，包括队列管理器和队列相关命令。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically pause playback when Obsidian loses focus and resume when it regains focus.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当Obsidian失去焦点时自动暂停播放，当它重新获得焦点时恢复播放。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Enable option to select "Generate MP3" in the file and editor menus.')
regex.target: .setDesc('启用选项，在文件和编辑器菜单中选择"生成MP3。"')

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the folder to save generated MP3 files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定用于保存生成的MP3文件的文件夹。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Embed a link to the generated MP3 file in the note.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在笔记中嵌入指向生成的MP3文件的链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Replaces spaces in mp3 file name with underscores (used for system compatibility).")
regex.target: .setDesc("将mp3文件名中的空格替换为下划线（用于系统兼容性）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable access to experimental features that may not be fully stable. These features are gated behind this toggle for safety.")
regex.target: .setDesc("允许访问可能不完全稳定的实验功能。为了安全起见，这些功能都在这个开关后面。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show fewer notification popups on mobile devices to reduce screen clutter. Disable this for more verbose feedback.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在移动设备上显示更少的通知弹出窗口，以减少屏幕混乱。禁用此选项以获得更详细的反馈。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Remove YAML frontmatter (metadata between --- delimiters) from the beginning of notes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("从注释的开头删除YAML frontmatter（---分隔符之间的元数据）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Remove markdown links [text](url) completely. When enabled, both the link text and URL are removed.")
regex.target: .setDesc("完全删除markdown链接[text](url)。启用后，链接文本和URL都将被删除。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Remove Obsidian wiki-style links [[link]] and keep only the display text.")
regex.target: .setDesc("删除Obsidian 维基风格的链接[[link]]，只保留显示文本。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Remove backtick markers from inline code (`code`) while keeping the code text.")
regex.target: .setDesc("移除行内代码的反引号标记(`code`)，但保留代码文本本身。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Remove Obsidian callout blocks (> [!note], > [!warning], etc.) while keeping the content.")
regex.target: .setDesc("删除Obsidian callout 块 (>[!note], >[!warning] 等，同时）保留内容。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Remove highlight markers ==text== while keeping the highlighted text.")
regex.target: .setDesc("删除突出显示标记==text==，同时保留突出显示的文本。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Remove HTML comments <!-- comment --> and Obsidian comments %%comment%%.")
regex.target: .setDesc("移除 HTML 注释和 Obsidian 注释 %%comment%%。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Remove HTML tags while preserving the text content.")
regex.target: .setDesc("删除HTML标记，同时保留文本内容。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Replace < and > symbols with words to prevent XML parsing issues with multiple symbols on the same line. Language and text can be customized in Symbol Replacement section below.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用单词替换<和>符号，以防止同一行上有多个符号的XML解析问题。语言和文本可以在下面的符号替换部分进行自定义。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Choose the language for symbol replacement words. "Auto" detects from your Obsidian interface language, with browser locale as fallback.')
regex.target: .setDesc('选择符号替换词的语言。"自动"从您的Obsidian界面语言中检测，浏览器区域设置作为回退。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable to define your own replacement text instead of using built-in language translations.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用以定义自己的替换文本，而不是使用内置语言翻译。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Text to replace ">" symbols with (e.g., " greater than ", " maior que ")')
regex.target: .setDesc('用文本替换">"符号 (例如, " greater than ", " maior que ")')

regex.source: .setDesc('Text to replace "<" symbols with (e.g., " less than ", " menor que ")')
regex.target: .setDesc('用文本替换"<"符号 (例如, " less than ", " menor que ")')

regex.source: .setDesc('Text to replace ">=" symbols with (e.g., " greater than or equal to ")')
regex.target: .setDesc('用文本替换">="符号 (例如," greater than or equal to ")')

regex.source: .setDesc('Text to replace "<=" symbols with (e.g., " less than or equal to ")')
regex.target: .setDesc('用文本替换"<="符号 (例如, " less than or equal to ")')

regex.source: .setDesc(`Preview of how symbols will be replaced in ${v==="auto"?"auto-detected":v} language:`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`预览在 ${v==="auto"?"auto-detected":v} 语言中如何替换符号：`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Maximum characters per chunk when generating MP3 for long notes. Smaller chunks may be more reliable but take longer. Default: 9000")
regex.target: .setDesc("为长笔记生成 MP3 时每块的最大字符数。较小的块可能更可靠，但耗时更长。默认值：9000")
.append("您可以在以下网址试听可用的声音")

regex.source: .append("Leave empty to use the selected voice above.")
regex.target: .append("留空以使用上面选择的语音。")

regex.target: Error("消息太短，无法包含标头长度")

regex.target: Error("随机字节长度必须大于等于16")

regex.source: Error("Namespace must be array-like (16 iterable integer values, 0-255)")
regex.target: Error("命名空间必须是类似数组的（16个可迭代整数值，0-255)")

regex.source: Error("could not read FormData body as blob")
Error("could not read FormData body as text")
regex.target: Error("无法将FormData正文读取为文本")

regex.source: Error("Body not allowed for GET or HEAD requests")
regex.target: Error("GET或HEAD请求不允许使用正文")

regex.source: Error("Failed to construct 'Response': The status provided (0) is outside the range [200, 599].")
regex.target: Error("构造'响应'失败：提供的状态（0）超出范围[200,599]。")

regex.source: Error("No socket was returned in the `connect()` function")
regex.target: Error("在`connect()`函数中没有返回套接字")

regex.source: Error("Proxy connection ended before receiving CONNECT response")
regex.target: Error("在收到CONNECT响应之前，代理连接已结束")

regex.target: Error("未收到来自代理CONNECT响应的标头")

regex.source: Error("No crypto implementation available. Please install isomorphic-webcrypto.")
regex.target: Error("没有可用的加密实现。请安装isomorphic-webcrypto。")
Error("访问者必须是一个函数")

regex.source: Error("header name must be a non-empty string")
regex.target: Error("标头名称必须是非空字符串")

regex.source: Error("Object iterator must return a key-value pair")
regex.target: Error("对象迭代器必须返回键值对")
Error("解析器必须是布尔|regexp|函数")

regex.source: Error("takes an object of state variables to update or a function which returns an object of state variables.")
regex.target: Error("接受一个状态变量对象进行更新，或接受一个返回状态变量对象的函数。")

regex.source: Error("useEffect CRUD overload is not enabled in this build of React.")
regex.target: Error("此React版本中未启用useEffect CRUD重载。")

regex.source: Error("No suitable Communicate class found in the loaded edge-tts-universal package. Expected Communicate or IsomorphicCommunicate.")
regex.target: Error("在加载的 edge-tts-universal 包中未找到合适的 Communicate 类。预期为 Communicate 或 IsomorphicCommunicate。")

regex.source: Error("Buffer not available and cannot convert Uint8Array")
regex.target: Error("缓冲区不可用，无法转换Uint8Array")

regex.source: Error("MP3 generation is not supported on mobile devices due to file system limitations. Use audio playback instead.")
regex.target: Error("由于文件系统的限制，移动设备不支持MP3生成。请改用音频播放。")

regex.source: Error("No valid chunks created from text")
regex.target: Error("没有从文本创建有效块")

regex.source: Error("Failed to generate any audio chunks")

For long notes (over ~1500 words or 9000 characters), MP3 generation will automatically use a chunked approach. This splits the text into smaller parts, generates audio for each part, then combines them. A progress indicator will show the status of each chunk during generation.
regex.target: 对于长篇笔记（超过 1500 个单词或 9000 个字符），MP3 会自动使用分块方式生成。这会将文本分割成较小的部分，为每个部分生成音频，然后将它们合并。在生成过程中，进度指示器会显示每个分块的状态。
